goal: Close 3 CLI gaps in vendor/get-anything-done that surfaced 2026-04-21 from monorepo lane: (1) gad tasks show <id> [--projectid <id>] — print full task body + comments from .planning/tasks/<id>.json (per-task JSON canonical post-63-11). Pattern: bin/commands/tasks/list.cjs factory, add bin/commands/tasks/show.cjs, wire into tasks dispatcher. (2) gad errors --projectid <id> — currently returns 'No error attempts found' even when .planning/ERRORS-AND-ATTEMPTS.xml has entries (22 entries on global today). Likely reads wrong path or wrong projectid resolver. (3) gad blockers --projectid <id> — returns 'No blockers found' even when ERRORS-AND-ATTEMPTS.xml entries carry status='open' or blocks='<task-id>' attributes (2 OPEN today: gad-team-windows-detached-spawn-2026-04-21 blocks 05-07, highlight-on-child-missing-identified-wrapping-2026-04-21 blocks 05-07-phase-3). Verification: from monorepo root, gad tasks show 05-07 --projectid global prints the full goal block; gad errors --projectid global returns the 22 entries; gad blockers --projectid global returns the 2 OPEN. Lane: Codex (CLI surface). Filed via handoff per Claude-discusses/Codex-implements split.
resolution: Added gad tasks show plus current ERRORS/BLOCKERS readers and regression coverage.
